text:
Tier 3 

1 in 5th digit = Tier 4 

1 in 6th digit = Tier 5 

1 in 7th digit = Tier 6 

1 in 8th digit = Tier 7 

1 in 9th digit =Tier 8 

1 in 10th digit = Tier 9 

1 in 1st digit =Tier 10 

COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2010; it changed from 10 characters to 6 in 2011. 
The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors 
to CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 
Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly
